content.observe: There's one call left. Not fork, not exec, not exit — something final. A call that ends this system and lets you leave it.
content.fault: You hesitated at the door. There's no partial version of this call. It's this, completely, or you stay.

[final] Kernel-ka: 'I've been waiting 15 years for you.'
